name: io.github.onenomad-llc/przm-voice
description: przm Voice MCP server — evolving personality, behavioral signals, style adaptations, and soul file management. Local file-based store; no API keys needed.

environmentVariables.name: PRZM_VOICE_DATA_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for soul files, evolution journals, and presets. Defaults to ~/.claude/przm-voice. Legacy name PERSONA_DATA_DIR is also accepted.
